data.title: Bitcoin (BTC) volatility matches the moves of S&P 500 for the past month
data.description:
Bitcoin (BTC) moved in line with the S&P stock index, tracking even daily movements. The leading coin has turned into a proxy for the US economy and is seen as a potential signal for a stock market reversal.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-volatility-match-the-move-of-sp-500/

data.title: Grayscale Debuts More Bitcoin ETFs—With a Twist
data.description:
Two new funds will use covered call strategies that allow holders to buy equity shares they already own at a given price.
source: https://decrypt.co/312857/grayscale-debuts-bitcoin-etfs-exposure-to-btc-movement

data.title: Ripple’s XRP Price Explosion Dreams Hang On as Whales Flee to Crypto Exchanges
data.description:
XRP traders’ woes continue as expectations for a short-term rebound fail to build momentum. Trading over the weekend triggered a new wave of outflows with the futures market weakening already low sentiments. In the last 48 hours, several large holders have sold the asset, leading to a 5% price drop. Liquidation Imbalance Triggers Selloff Per […]
source: https://zycrypto.com/ripples-xrp-explosion-dreams-hang-on-as-whales-flee-to-crypto-exchanges/

data.title: First Digital to 'Pursue Legal Action' Over Justin Sun Allegations as FDUSD Drops
data.description:
The stablecoin FDUSD deviated from its price peg after Tron founder Justin Sun alleged that First Digital Trust is 'effectively insolvent. ' The company strongly denied these claims and announced legal action.
source: https://www.bankless.com/read/first-digital-to-pursue-legal-action-over-justin-sun-allegations-as-fdusd-drops

data.title: VanEck Lists Celestia TIA ETN on European Exchanges
data.description:
VanEck launches ETN for Celestia's TIA, listing it on Euronext, offering regulated access to modular blockchain investments.
source: https://coincu.com/330055-vaneck-celestia-etn-euronext

data.title: FDUSD issuer refutes Justin Sun’s insolvency allegations, calls it a ‘smear campaign’
data.description:
First Digital Trust (FDT) denied Justin Sun insolvency allegations and said its stablecoin is fully backed with US Treasury bills. Sun had made the allegation earlier in the day in a social media post, where he said the firm was insolvent and unable to process the redemption of its stablecoin, FDUSD.
source: https://cryptoslate.com/fdusd-issuer-refutes-justin-suns-insolvency-allegations-calls-it-a-smear-campaign/

data.title: Meme Coin Holders Panic as Whales Dump PEPE, DOGE & Shiba Inu
data.description:
Recent fluctuations in the top crypto prices have taken their toll on meme coins, leading to whales plunging into panic mode.
source: https://zycrypto.com/meme-coin-holders-panic-as-whales-dump-pepe-doge-shiba-inu/

data.title: Critics say Ethereum must empower L2s, not extract value from them
data.description:
Ye Zhang, the co-founder of layer-2 network Scroll, has criticized the proposal to charge Ethereum Layer-2 networks. In a post on X, Zhang described such proposals as bad for the network’s long-term growth. According to Zhang, imposing tariffs on Ethereum L2s to generate fees on the mainnet will damage the network’s future. In his opinion, […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/critics-say-ethereum-must-empower-l2s/
